# Malatamba Vidyaniketan — School in Visakhapatnam
> Premier co-educational English medium school established 2002, PM Palem, Visakhapatnam, AP.

## About
- Founded: 2002
- Affiliation: APSCERT, AP Government Recognized
- Location: Sadguru Towers, Malatamba Road, PM Palem, Visakhapatnam 530041
- Classes: Nursery to Class X
- Chairman: Mr. Suneel Mahanty

## Facilities
- Smart Classrooms (20+ rooms with smart boards)
- Science & Computer Labs (40 computers)
- Library (3,000+ books)
- Safe Transport (city-wide routes, male & female attendants)
- Sports: Cricket Ground, Football Field, Athletics Track, Volleyball, Throwball, Indoor Games, Outdoor Games
- Campus: Yoga Room, Library Room, Conference Room, Digital Classroom, Auditorium Stage, Art Room, Music Room, Landscaped Grounds

## Contact
- Phone: 8985674670
- Email: principalmalatambaschools@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.malatambavidyaniketan.ac.in
